title: [BUG] TypeScript - outlineProperties not available
author: ArneBuetergerds
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.3.0

## Steps To Reproduce

Using exceljs with typescript you're not able to set outlineProperties.
The type WorksheetProperties do not include outlineProperties.

```typescript
worksheet.properties.outlineProperties = {
  summaryBelow: true,
  summaryRight: false,
};
```
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/40249316/221132817-8365a1b7-4933-4065-a39b-73fb6d142ef7.png)


## The expected behaviour:

The outline properties can be set on the worksheet:

```typescript
worksheet.properties.outlineProperties = {
  summaryBelow: true,
  summaryRight: false,
};
```

comments.author: sgorozhankin
